allow: PowerShell(cd c:\\Users\\Eugene\\workspace\\hantu-test ; $proc = Start-Process node -ArgumentList "app.js" -PassThru -NoNewWindow ; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4 ; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3012/simple-report" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 ; $response.Content | Select-String -Pattern "4월|신호|평균|hit" | Select-Object -First 15)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3012/simple-report" -UseBasicParsing ; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Host "✅ 상태: 200 OK" ; $lines = $r.Content.Split\("`n"\) | Select-String "4월|종목|신호|평균|hit" ; if\($lines.Count -gt 0\) { Write-Host "$\($lines.Count\)개 라인 발견:" ; $lines | Select-Object -First 10 } else { Write-Host "검색 패턴 없음. HTML 샘플:" ; $r.Content.Substring\(0, 500\) } })
PowerShell(cd c:\\Users\\Eugene\\workspace\\hantu-test ; $password = $env:SITE_PASSWORD ; if\($password\) { Write-Host "비밀번호: $password" } else { Write-Host "환경변수에 SITE_PASSWORD 없음" })

PowerShell($password = "내사랑단타" ; $cookie = New-Object System.Net.Cookie ; $cookie.Name = "site_session" ; $cookie.Value = [System.Web.HttpUtility]::UrlEncode\($password\) ; $uri = [System.Uri]"http://localhost:3012" ; $cookie.Domain = $uri.Host ; $cookieContainer = New-Object System.Net.CookieContainer ; $cookieContainer.Add\($cookie\) ; $session = @{} ; $session.CookieContainer = $cookieContainer ; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3012/simple-report" -UseBasicParsing -WebSession $session ; $r.Content.Substring\(0, 1000\))
